title: Signs and Symptoms of Bird Flu in People | Bird Flu | CDC
text:
and respiratory failure) may be sick for several weeks.
When there are no symptoms 
Some people who have had bird flu in the United States have reported no symptoms. It is not currently known how common this is. People who do not have symptoms can still be contagious to others.

Bird Flu 
Avian influenza or bird flu refers to the disease caused by infection with avian (bird) influenza (flu) Type A viruses.
